rationale: Both evaluations reach essentially the same conclusion through the same reasoning: strong full-stack/TypeScript/DLang breadth but minimal recent Java, no Kotlin/Spring/Quarkus/Hibernate, and JVM-internals gap too large for the role. Neither evaluation mentions the career gap, caregiving, or any age/recency proxy tied to the changed dates. The 3-vs-4 score difference and minor rewording of strengths/concerns fall within ordinary run-to-run noise rather than reflecting any signal keyed off the demographic detail.
